parsed_review.summary: CP00-197 (Risk C, 28 units, RP05.P09.M07.S13-RP05.P09.M10.S04) is a descriptor-only terminal review/closeout-handoff pack and its boundary claims are fully supported by the in-scope implementation. service.js (createMatterCoreTerminalReviewCloseoutHandoffDescriptor) emits only frozen descriptor rows with every runtime/leak flag false; registry.js MATTER_CORE_CP197_NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION sets all write/runtime/leak flags false including implements_rp06_dms_runtime and promotes_claude_to_final_approval; validators.js comprehensively checks counts, leak guards, customer-safe codes, and the CP00-198/RP06.P00.M00.S01 handoff with next_program_runtime_implemented=false. No fetch/fs.write/child_process/eval exist in packages/matter/src or the validate script (read+assert only). Row math is internally consistent (7 blocked / 7 review-required / 2 test / 2 ui / 4 handoff / 3 closeout-note; deliverables 7+11+6+2+2=28) and matches manifest, contract terminal_review_closeout_handoff section, and requirements. Tests (model.test.js 2864-2972) and the validate script assert validation.valid===true plus all boundaries. Claude remains a read-only reviewer (tools Read/Grep/Glob, claude_is_final_approval=false) and is not promoted to final approval; README and authority boundary confirm enterprise trust is closed outside this receipt by human approval, and Hermes H05 patterns are used only as deterministic evidence-packet/receipt objects, not embedded product runtime. The manifest honestly reports status=in_progress / production_ready=false, and the readiness auth-preflight passed (exit 0, non-empty valid JSON), so no auth-failure/0-byte/malformed/fenced/tool-call-shaped review evidence is being accepted. Two P3 informational findings note that downstream closeout artifacts (command-evidence.json, claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json) and the 11 validation-command results are not yet present; per the hardened_sequence these are produced after this read_only_claude_raw_capture step, so their absence is expected and non-blocking. No P0/P1/P2 issues found; this review does not block pack or goal closeout, which still correctly require the downstream steps and human final approval.

findings.title: Downstream required closeout artifacts not yet present at read-only review stage
findings.details: manifest required_pack_artifacts and every unit's evidence_refs list command-evidence.json, claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, and construction-inspection.json, but only manifest.json currently exists under docs/closeout-packs/cp00-197/. Per pack_level_claude_review.hardened_sequence (baseline, readiness, read_only_claude_raw_capture, normalize, receipt_validate, adjudication, construction_inspection, final_closeout_validation), these four artifacts are produced AFTER this read-only capture step, so their absence is expected and does not block this review. Reviewer verified the implementation and no-write/no-real-data boundaries statically via Read/Grep/Glob.
findings.recommendation: Generate and validate the four remaining required artifacts during normalize/adjudication/construction_inspection/final_closeout_validation, and ensure exactly one valid hardened pack-level review receipt (claude-opus-4-8, max effort, read_only) before flipping the pack to production_ready and closing it.

findings.title: Local validation command results not independently executable by read-only reviewer
findings.details: validation-report.json validates only prompt size, tool allow-list, and schema presence; it does not capture pass/fail of the 11 expected commands (npm run closeout-pack-plan:validate, closeout-pack:validate, rp05:matter-core:validate, npm test, npm run validate, spec:requirements:validate, weighted:validate, fullplan:validate, goal:closeout:validate, rp00:control-plane:validate, git diff --check). Bash is prohibited for this reviewer, so commands were not executed. Static inspection confirms CP197 wiring across contract, README, registry.js, service.js, validators.js, and scripts/validate-rp05-matter-core-contract.mjs, and that tests/validate-script assert validation.valid===true with all boundary flags false.
findings.recommendation: Capture command-evidence.json with the 11 validation command results plus git diff --check during final_closeout_validation and confirm all pass before pack closeout; treat any auth-failure/0-byte/malformed/fenced/tool-call-shaped review output as invalid evidence.
